text_excerpt: News & Updates from the Stroud Constituency - Dr Simon Opher MP Simon Opher Home About Gallery News & Updates Stroud Simon in the News Simon Says, Let’s Talk Newsletters Parliamentary Updates ↗ Voting record ↗ Early Day Motions ↗ Spoken contributions ↗ Written questions Help & Advice Contact ↗ Facebook ↗ Instagram ↗ Bluesky News & Updates Search Newsletter – April 2026 30 April 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Newsletters , Parliamentary Updates , Stroud Constituency News Read More 🠂 Question for Department of Health and Social Care – 128145 17 April 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Department of Health and Social Care , Parliamentary Updates , Written Questions To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what proportion of GPs have left each ICB in the last 12 months. Read More 🠂 Question for Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs – 126761 13 April 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs , Parliamentary Updates , Written Questions To ask the Secretary of State for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs, what steps is she taking to improve food security. Read More 🠂 Question for Department for Culture, Media and Sport – 124963 10 April 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Department for Culture, Media and Sport , Parliamentary Updates , Written Questions To ask the Secretary of State for Culture, Media and Sport, with reference to Written Statement HCWS1273, made on 27 January 2026, whether she plans to allocate some of the £400m grassroots sports funding to lidos. Read More 🠂 Newsletter – March 2026 31 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Newsletters , Parliamentary Updates , Stroud Constituency News Read More 🠂 McMurtry Automotive 30 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Stroud Constituency News Great to visit McMurtry Automotive’s factory down in Wotton last week. Huge thank you to Tom and the team for showing me the amazing Spéirling PURE fan car. A genuinely amazing feat of engineering, an electric car… Read More 🠂 Litter Free 29 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Stroud Constituency News There’s nothing like getting out and about litter picking on a bracing Sunday morning! 15 bags was a good – but shocking – haul. We have some amazing and dedicated councillors (from a variety of parties) who… Read More 🠂 Stratford Park Lido Update 29 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Stroud Constituency News There is now a feeling that it just might be possible to open the pool this year, but only, of course, if it is safe to do so. Councillors from Stroud District Council, Friends of Stratford Park… Read More 🠂 Rodborough Fields 29 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Stroud Constituency News Absolutely delighted that Rodborough Fields and Frome Banks Preservation Group have now taken ownership of part of Rodborough Fields. Many thanks to them, Stroud Common Wealth, and everyone else who worked so hard and donated so much… Read More 🠂 March Together 28 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Parliamentary Updates I stand for the values of compassion, care, and community. Today, thousands will travel to London (including many from Stroud), to show our unity against the politics of hate and division. If you can’t get there, support… Read More 🠂 Community Ownership Westminster Hall Debate 26 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Parliamentary Updates I have called for the establishment of a National Lido Fund. In Stroud, Stratford Park Lido is set to stay closed this summer. Many other outdoor swimming pools face immediate closure. I am pursuing additional funding, including… Read More 🠂 Question for Cabinet Office – 124194 26 March 2026 · Dr Simon Opher In: Cabinet Office , Parliamentary Updates , Written Questions To ask the Minister for the Cabinet Office, what assessment he has made of the potential merits of making a formal public response to the petition dated September 2025 on the United Kingdom’s historical role in Palestine.
